question_answered: What exact BuilderOS closure mission should ARC/BPB blueprint next?
answer: Close the machine-layer truth gaps before any new product expansion: queue completion semantics, self-repair escalation law, improvement-loop enforceability, receipt/twin synchronization, UI proof, and final certification truth.

resolved_decisions.decision: Do not execute this mission yet.
resolved_decisions.reason: Founder wants an external architect blueprint generated from the same input and compared before execution.

resolved_decisions.decision: BP_PRIORITY remains the only active product queue.
resolved_decisions.reason: No secondary orchestration queue is allowed.

resolved_decisions.decision: Point B remains LifeRE Alpha until the founder success test is actually proven.
resolved_decisions.reason: Canonical lock already exists in POINT_B_TARGET.json.

resolved_decisions.decision: TECHNICAL_PASS is not enough to mark Point B complete.
resolved_decisions.reason: Founder-usability and founder success proof remain required.

resolved_decisions.decision: Self-repair must follow a three-attempt escalation pattern with lessons carry-forward and research before higher escalation.
resolved_decisions.reason: Current two-attempt executor policy is below founder doctrine.

resolved_decisions.decision: The system must prove itself through the same LifeOS founder UI Adam uses.
Same-tier determinism must be tested with the same model tier intended to code.
resolved_decisions.reason: Testing with stronger models would hide blueprint weakness.

non_goals: Do not expand into new product lanes during this closure mission.
Do not create new departments or alternate governance names.
Do not certify FULLY_MACHINE_READY before proof.
